SEARCH
Package model.user

Class GraduateStudent

java.lang.Object
model.user.User
model.user.Student
model.user.GraduateStudent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<User>, Subscribable
public class GraduateStudent extends Student
Graduate student model for master and PhD students.

Graduate students are always researchers and may have diploma papers. Supervisor assignment enforces the project rule that the supervisor must be a researcher with h-index of at least 3.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • GraduateStudent

      public GraduateStudent(String name, String surname, String birthDate, String phoneNumber, String email, String password, String id, Integer yearOfStudy, Faculty faculty, Degree graduateDegree)
      Creates a graduate student with researcher capabilities enabled.
      Parameters:
      name - first name
      surname - family name
      birthDate - date of birth
      phoneNumber - contact phone
      email - email address
      password - initial password
      id - student identifier
      yearOfStudy - current year of study
      faculty - faculty affiliation
      graduateDegree - graduate degree, usually MASTER or PHD

  • Method Details

    • setSupervisor

      public void setSupervisor(Teacher supervisor) throws LowHIndexException
      Assigns a research supervisor after validating researcher status and h-index.
      Parameters:
      supervisor - teacher selected as supervisor
      Throws:
      LowHIndexException - if the teacher is not a researcher or has h-index below 3

    • addDiplomaPaper

      public void addDiplomaPaper(ResearchPaper paper)
      Adds a diploma paper and includes it in the student's research profile.
      Parameters:
      paper - diploma paper to register
